Grooming Stand by assist, set up
UE Dressing: Stand by assist, set up
Sit to Supine: Unable to assess (Comment) (up in recliner)
Today's Treatment: Functional mobility, ADL training, transfer training with above noted level of assistance.
Pt performed supine-sit transfer with CGA. Min A to scoot forward at EOB. Sit-stand with CGA and transfer
to recliner with CGA and FWW. U[on standing, pt incontinent of urine. LB hygiene completed with Min A. Pt
required assist to doff/don socks while seated in chair. Pt up in chair w/ call light and tray table within reach
at end of session. Nsg aware pt is up in chair.
Equipment Recommendation: (owns 4WW, cane; TBD pending progress)

3/5/2eMa r. 5. 2026 12:20PM Wein, Eleanore (MRN 0108655762) Printed by Nicole D Haralson [CNH105903]N 0. 39465 11:2P. 11/12
Today's Treatment: PT eval and mobility above performed. CGA with bed mobility with HOB partially
elevated. Required Min A to scoot hips towards EOB. Performed initial STS with HH Min A. Seated rest
break required d/t needing to urinate. Performed 2nd STS with FWW and CGA. Ambulated ~3ft with FWW
to recliner chair. Cues required for sequencing, hand placement and walker management. Pt will benefit
from continued skilled acute care PT to address deficits in strength, balance, gait and activity tolerance. Pt
left in recliner with all needs met, RN notified, call light within reach, and all lines intact.
Patient Response to Treatment: Tolerated well
Patient/Caregiver Education provided: PT POC, goals and d/c recommendations
Therapy Frequency: Daily. 3 days a week
